text: Only cooperation will accelerate the inland shipping transition. [Interview](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/interviews/index.html). [Transport & Logistics](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/logistiek/index.html). 04/11/2025 • 4 minutes reading. [Bart Banning](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/authors/bart-banning/index.html). More intimate cooperation between all parties involved is necessary, especially in these uncertain times.' ABN AMRO advocates more decisiveness between charterers, shippers, skippers, financiers and the government. Only then will the ecosystem work to make inland shipping future-proof.'. “We mainly offer certainty and reliability with our financing,” says Ard-Jan Vergunst.

metadata.source_title: Only cooperation will accelerate the inland shipping transition

text: Only cooperation will accelerate the inland shipping transition. [Interview](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/interviews/index.html). [Transport & Logistics](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/logistiek/index.html). 04/11/2025 • 4 minutes reading. [Bart Banning](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/authors/bart-banning/index.html). More intimate cooperation between all parties involved is necessary, especially in these uncertain times.' ABN AMRO advocates more decisiveness between charterers, shippers, skippers, financiers and the government. Only then will the ecosystem work to make inland shipping future-proof.'. “We mainly offer certainty and reliability with our financing,” says Ard-Jan Vergunst. He and his colleague Bart Banning emphasize that they want to build a world that is also future-proof from a logistics point of view.

metadata.source_title: Only cooperation will accelerate the inland shipping transition

text:
Ard Vergunst. Business Banker Inland Shipping at ABN AMRO
Inland shipping invests with a long-term focus. The bank wants to give greater weight to the interests of future generations in decision-making. ABN Amro describes this goal in English as 'Banking for better, for generations to come'. This fits in well with inland shipping, which often involves investments lasting decades.

metadata.source_title: Only cooperation will accelerate the inland shipping transition

text:
Business Banker Inland Shipping at ABN AMRO
Inland shipping invests with a long-term focus. The bank wants to give greater weight to the interests of future generations in decision-making. ABN Amro describes this goal in English as 'Banking for better, for generations to come'. This fits in well with inland shipping, which often involves investments lasting decades. Vergunst: 'And that means that with banking you don't just look at the present day, but actually always look ahead for a longer period.'.

text: ABN Amro describes this goal in English as 'Banking for better, for generations to come'. This fits in well with inland shipping, which often involves investments lasting decades. Vergunst: 'And that means that with banking you don't just look at the present day, but actually always look ahead for a longer period.'. metadata.source_title: Only cooperation will accelerate the inland shipping transition

text: The financing is long-term and must be appropriate. Vergunst: 'The ship owner mainly wants security and reliability, which makes it more difficult to pioneer a new technology. But we see that inland shipping is using new drives. If you have a new ship built, you can of course only make a choice once. Am I going to build that ship with a Stage V diesel engine, with HVO blending?

metadata.source_title: Only cooperation will accelerate the inland shipping transition

text: Vergunst: 'The ship owner mainly wants security and reliability, which makes it more difficult to pioneer a new technology. But we see that inland shipping is using new drives. If you have a new ship built, you can of course only make a choice once. Am I going to build that ship with a Stage V diesel engine, with HVO blending? Or do I opt for a hybrid drive, so that I have the choice to adjust the motorization in the future?

metadata.source_title: Only cooperation will accelerate the inland shipping transition

text: But we see that inland shipping is using new drives. If you have a new ship built, you can of course only make a choice once. Am I going to build that ship with a Stage V diesel engine, with HVO blending? Or do I opt for a hybrid drive, so that I have the choice to adjust the motorization in the future? Or am I now going to take the step towards a completely zero-emission ship?

metadata.source_title: Only cooperation will accelerate the inland shipping transition

text: If you have a new ship built, you can of course only make a choice once. Am I going to build that ship with a Stage V diesel engine, with HVO blending? We will discuss this decision with the customer.'.

metadata.source_title: Only cooperation will accelerate the inland shipping transition

text: The burden on inland navigation skippers is increasing, but the prospects for the future seem favorable, say Vergunst and Banning. Vergunst: 'Sustainability is just one theme. We are dealing with transport flows in the world that are changing, partly due to American import tariffs. We see lower water levels in the Rhine, personnel costs have risen enormously. There are all kinds of things going on and that demands a lot from such an inland shipping entrepreneur.'.

metadata.source_title: Only cooperation will accelerate the inland shipping transition

text: Vergunst: 'Sustainability is just one theme. We are dealing with transport flows in the world that are changing, partly due to American import tariffs. We see lower water levels in the Rhine, personnel costs have risen enormously. There are all kinds of things going on and that demands a lot from such an inland shipping entrepreneur.'. Banning: 'But if you look in the medium term, everyone is positive about the rising volumes in freight transport.

metadata.source_title: Only cooperation will accelerate the inland shipping transition

text: We are dealing with transport flows in the world that are changing, partly due to American import tariffs. We see lower water levels in the Rhine, personnel costs have risen enormously. There are all kinds of things going on and that demands a lot from such an inland shipping entrepreneur.'. Banning: 'But if you look in the medium term, everyone is positive about the rising volumes in freight transport. The port of Rotterdam, for example, says that it will handle approximately 50% extra containers between now and 2035, around 8 million TEU.

metadata.source_title: Only cooperation will accelerate the inland shipping transition

text: We see lower water levels in the Rhine, personnel costs have risen enormously. There are all kinds of things going on and that demands a lot from such an inland shipping entrepreneur.'. Banning: 'But if you look in the medium term, everyone is positive about the rising volumes in freight transport. The port of Rotterdam, for example, says that it will handle approximately 50% extra containers between now and 2035, around 8 million TEU. The hope is that a large part of this will go via inland shipping, which still has space, unlike road transport.'. > “Inland shipping needs a well-thought-out label system.”.

metadata.source_title: Only cooperation will accelerate the inland shipping transition

text:
Bart Banning. Sector Banker Transport & Logistics
Logistics ecosystem is all about collaboration. Collaboration is the key to achieving successful improvements faster. Banning: 'We call this the logistics ecosystem surrounding inland shipping. These are all stakeholders who benefit from a healthy inland shipping sector.

metadata.source_title: Only cooperation will accelerate the inland shipping transition

text:
Sector Banker Transport & Logistics
Logistics ecosystem is all about collaboration. Collaboration is the key to achieving successful improvements faster. Banning: 'We call this the logistics ecosystem surrounding inland shipping. These are all stakeholders who benefit from a healthy inland shipping sector. The skippers benefit from the clients doing as much as possible via inland shipping and the clients benefit from the skippers transporting the goods efficiently and cleanly.

metadata.source_title: Only cooperation will accelerate the inland shipping transition

text: Collaboration is the key to achieving successful improvements faster. Banning: 'We call this the logistics ecosystem surrounding inland shipping. These are all stakeholders who benefit from a healthy inland shipping sector. The skippers benefit from the clients doing as much as possible via inland shipping and the clients benefit from the skippers transporting the goods efficiently and cleanly. Shippers, politicians and the financial sector are also involved.

metadata.source_title: Only cooperation will accelerate the inland shipping transition

text: Banning: 'We call this the logistics ecosystem surrounding inland shipping. These are all stakeholders who benefit from a healthy inland shipping sector. The skippers benefit from the clients doing as much as possible via inland shipping and the clients benefit from the skippers transporting the goods efficiently and cleanly. Shippers, politicians and the financial sector are also involved. If the ecosystem starts to work closely together, its potential will be utilised.'.

metadata.source_title: Only cooperation will accelerate the inland shipping transition

text: These are all stakeholders who benefit from a healthy inland shipping sector. The skippers benefit from the clients doing as much as possible via inland shipping and the clients benefit from the skippers transporting the goods efficiently and cleanly. Shippers, politicians and the financial sector are also involved. If the ecosystem starts to work closely together, its potential will be utilised.'. Banning: 'An example of the ecosystem is to jointly further activate the existing emission label system.

metadata.source_title: Only cooperation will accelerate the inland shipping transition

text: The skippers benefit from the clients doing as much as possible via inland shipping and the clients benefit from the skippers transporting the goods efficiently and cleanly. Shippers, politicians and the financial sector are also involved. If the ecosystem starts to work closely together, its potential will be utilised.'. Banning: 'An example of the ecosystem is to jointly further activate the existing emission label system. The Dutch emissions system can be an example for the emissions system at European level.

metadata.source_title: Only cooperation will accelerate the inland shipping transition

text: Shippers, politicians and the financial sector are also involved. If the ecosystem starts to work closely together, its potential will be utilised.'. Banning: 'An example of the ecosystem is to jointly further activate the existing emission label system. The Dutch emissions system can be an example for the emissions system at European level. A well-thought-out label system provides insight into the way in which the inland shipping sector carries out logistics for shippers, insurers, banks and port companies, leading to financial benefits that benefit the business model.' Vergunst: 'Everyone bears their own responsibility and has a contribution to that ecosystem.'.

Vergunst: 'Everyone bears their own responsibility and has a contribution to that ecosystem.'. This interview was written by Helmuth de Hoogh of ProMedia Group and delivered in the context of the special surrounding the Schuttevaer Ship Engine Event.

text: Read more in the transport and logistics sector. After a difficult year, in which international trade declined due to a rapid reduction of excess inventories, the transport sector has started a cautious recovery. At the beginning of 2024, freight volumes increased in both container shipping and aviation. Thanks to the improving economic growth, the sector can recover further. However, the recovery is being held back by lower demand for building materials.

metadata.source_title: Only cooperation will accelerate the inland shipping transition

text:
After a difficult year, in which international trade declined due to a rapid reduction of excess inventories, the transport sector has started a cautious recovery. At the beginning of 2024, freight volumes increased in both container shipping and aviation. Thanks to the improving economic growth, the sector can recover further. However, the recovery is being held back by lower demand for building materials. In the meantime, road transport will have to deal with a pile-up of environmental regulations in the coming years.
